name: Gujerati-Style Cabbage with Carrots (Sambhara)
recipeInstructions:
1. Core the cabbage and cut it into fine, long shreds.
2. Peel the carrots and grate them coarsely.
3. Cut the green chili into thin, long strips.
4. Heat the oil in a wide, casserole-type pot over medium-high flame until hot.
5. Add the asafetida. A second later, add the mustard seeds. When they begin to pop, add the dried red chili. Stir once; the chili should turn dark red within seconds.
6. Add the cabbage, carrots, and green chili. Reduce heat to medium and stir the vegetables for about half a minute.
7. Incorporate the salt, sugar, and chopped fresh coriander. Continue stirring until the vegetables are just done while still retaining some crispness.
8. Stir in the lemon juice. Mix well.
9. Remove the whole red chili before serving those unfamiliar with Indian foods.
